topic: surface area of a rectangular prism, comparing surface areas
latex:
A shipping crate in the shape of a rectangular prism measures 5 feet by 4 feet by 3 feet.

\textbf{a.} Find the surface area of the crate.

\textbf{b.} By how much does the surface area of the crate increase when its length, width, and height are each increased by 1 foot?
